# =============================================================================
# database.py - Database Layer
# =============================================================================

class Database:
    """SQLite-based database with support for efficient querying and real-time updates."""

    def __init__(self, db_path: str = ":memory:"):
        self.db_path = db_path
        self._local = threading.local()
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._listeners: List[callable] = []
        self._init_schema()

    @property
    def conn(self) -> sqlite3.Connection:
        if not hasattr(self._local, "conn") or self._local.conn is None:
            self._local.conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path, check_same_thread=False)
            self._local.conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
            self._local.conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
            self._local.conn.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON")
        return self._local.conn

    def _init_schema(self):
        with self._lock:
            conn = self.conn
            conn.executescript("""
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
                    salt TEXT NOT NULL,
                    display_name TEXT,
                    avatar_url TEXT,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    last_login TEXT,
                    is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    token TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                    expires_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quests (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    title TEXT NOT NULL,
                    description TEXT,
                    quest_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'main',
                    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
                    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    difficulty TEXT DEFAULT 'normal',
                    xp_reward INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    gold_reward INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    creator_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    assignee_id TEXT,
                    parent_quest_id TEXT,
                    due_date TEXT,
                    completed_at TEXT,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (creator_id) REFERENCES users(id),
                    FOREIGN KEY (assignee_id) REFERENCES users(id),
                    FOREIGN KEY (parent_quest_id) REFERENCES quests(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quest_objectives (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    quest_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    description TEXT NOT NULL,
                    is_completed INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    order_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (quest_id) REFERENCES quests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quest_tags (
                    quest_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    tag TEXT NOT NULL,
                    PRIMARY KEY (quest_id, tag),
                    FOREIGN KEY (quest_id) REFERENCES quests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_trees (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    name TEXT NOT NULL,
                    description TEXT,
                    creator_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    class_type TEXT,
                    max_points INTEGER DEFAULT 100,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (creator_id) REFERENCES users(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skills (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    skill_tree_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    name TEXT NOT NULL,
                    description TEXT,
                    tier INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                    max_level INTEGER DEFAULT 5,
                    current_level INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    cost_per_level INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                    parent_skill_id TEXT,
                    position_x REAL DEFAULT 0,
                    position_y REAL DEFAULT 0,
                    icon TEXT,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (skill_tree_id) REFERENCES skill_trees(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                    FOREIGN KEY (parent_skill_id) REFERENCES skills(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_prerequisites (
                    skill_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    prerequisite_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    required_level INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                    PRIMARY KEY (skill_id, prerequisite_id),
                    FOREIGN KEY (skill_id) REFERENCES skills(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                    FOREIGN KEY (prerequisite_id) REFERENCES skills(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collaboration_rooms (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    name TEXT NOT NULL,
                    room_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'quest',
                    reference_id TEXT,
                    creator_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    max_participants INTEGER DEFAULT 10,
                    is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (creator_id) REFERENCES users(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_participants (
                    room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    role TEXT DEFAULT 'member',
                    joined_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    PRIMARY KEY (room_id, user_id),
                    FOREIGN KEY (room_id) REFERENCES collaboration_rooms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_messages (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    room_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    message_type TEXT DEFAULT 'text',
                    content TEXT NOT NULL,
                    metadata TEXT,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (room_id) REFERENCES collaboration_rooms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quest_collaborators (
                    quest_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    permission TEXT DEFAULT 'view',
                    added_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    PRIMARY KEY (quest_id, user_id),
                    FOREIGN KEY (quest_id) REFERENCES quests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_plan_shares (
                    skill_tree_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    permission TEXT DEFAULT 'view',
                    shared_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    PRIMARY KEY (skill_tree_id, user_id),
                    FOREIGN KEY (skill_tree_id) REFERENCES skill_trees(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
                );

                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS activity_log (
                    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    action TEXT NOT NULL,
                    entity_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                    entity_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    details TEXT,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
                );

                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_creator ON quests(creator_id);
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_status ON quests(status);
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quests_assignee ON quests(assignee_id);
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skills_tree ON skills(skill_tree_id);
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_room ON room_messages(room_id);
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activity_user ON activity_log(user_id);
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_token ON sessions(token);
            """)
            conn.commit()

    def execute(self, query: str, params: tuple = ()) -> sqlite3.Cursor:
        with self._lock:
            cursor = self.conn.execute(query, params)
            self.conn.commit()
            return cursor

    def fetch_one(self, query: str, params: tuple = ()) -> Optional[Dict]:
        with self._lock:
            cursor = self.conn.execute(query, params)
            row = cursor.fetchone()
            return dict(row) if row else None

    def fetch_all(self, query: str, params: tuple = ()) -> List[Dict]:
        with self._lock:
            cursor = self.conn.execute(query, params)
            return [dict(row) for row in cursor.fetchall()]

    def add_listener(self, callback: callable):
        self._listeners.append(callback)

    def notify_change(self, event_type: str, data: Dict):
        for listener in self._listeners:
            try:
                listener(event_type, data)
            except Exception:
                pass

class AuthService:
    """Handles user authentication, registration, and session management."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db
        self.token_expiry_hours = 24

    def _hash_password(self, password: str, salt: str) -> str:
        return hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac(
            'sha256', password.encode(), salt.encode(), 100000
        ).hex()

    def register(self, username: str, email: str, password: str,
                 display_name: Optional[str] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        existing = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = ? OR email = ?",
            (username, email)
        )
        if existing:
            return {"error": "Username or email already exists"}

        salt = secrets.token_hex(32)
        password_hash = self._hash_password(password, salt)
        user_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()

        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, password_hash, salt,
               display_name, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (user_id, username, email, password_hash, salt,
             display_name or username, now, now)
        )

        token = self._create_session(user_id)
        return {
            "user_id": user_id,
            "username": username,
            "token": token,
            "display_name": display_name or username
        }

    def login(self, username: str, password: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        user = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = ? AND is_active = 1",
            (username,)
        )
        if not user:
            return {"error": "Invalid credentials"}

        password_hash = self._hash_password(password, user["salt"])
        if password_hash != user["password_hash"]:
            return {"error": "Invalid credentials"}

        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE users SET last_login = ? WHERE id = ?",
            (now, user["id"])
        )

        token = self._create_session(user["id"])
        return {
            "user_id": user["id"],
            "username": user["username"],
            "token": token,
            "display_name": user["display_name"]
        }

    def _create_session(self, user_id: str) -> str:
        token = secrets.token_urlsafe(64)
        session_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        expires_at = (datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(hours=self.token_expiry_hours)).isoformat()
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()

        self.db.execute(
            "DELETE FROM sessions WHERE user_id = ? AND expires_at < ?",
            (user_id, now)
        )
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO sessions (id, user_id, token, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (session_id, user_id, token, expires_at, now)
        )
        return token

    def validate_token(self, token: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        session = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT s.*, u.username, u.display_name FROM sessions s "
            "JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id "
            "WHERE s.token = ? AND s.expires_at > ?",
            (token, now)
        )
        if session:
            return {
                "user_id": session["user_id"],
                "username": session["username"],
                "display_name": session["display_name"]
            }
        return None

    def logout(self, token: str) -> bool:
        self.db.execute("DELETE FROM sessions WHERE token = ?", (token,))
        return True

    def get_user_profile(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        user = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT id, username, email, display_name, avatar_url, "
            "created_at, last_login FROM users WHERE id = ?",
            (user_id,)
        )
        return user

    def update_profile(self, user_id: str, updates: Dict) -> Dict:
        allowed = {"display_name", "avatar_url", "email"}
        filtered = {k: v for k, v in updates.items() if k in allowed}
        if not filtered:
            return {"error": "No valid fields to update"}

        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        filtered["updated_at"] = now
        set_clause = ", ".join(f"{k} = ?" for k in filtered)
        values = list(filtered.values()) + [user_id]

        self.db.execute(
            f"UPDATE users SET {set_clause} WHERE id = ?", tuple(values)
        )
        return {"success": True, "updated_fields": list(filtered.keys())}

# quest_service.py - Quest Management Service
# =============================================================================

class QuestService:
    """Manages quest creation, updates, completion, and collaboration."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db

    def create_quest(self, creator_id: str, data: Dict) -> Dict:
        quest_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()

        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO quests (id, title, description, quest_type, status,
               priority, difficulty, xp_reward, gold_reward, creator_id,
               assignee_id, parent_quest_id, due_date, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (quest_id, data.get("title", "Untitled Quest"),
             data.get("description"), data.get("quest_type", "main"),
             "active", data.get("priority", 0),
             data.get("difficulty", "normal"),
             data.get("xp_reward", 0), data.get("gold_reward", 0),
             creator_id, data.get("assignee_id"),
             data.get("parent_quest_id"), data.get("due_date"), now, now)
        )

        # Add objectives
        for i, obj in enumerate(data.get("objectives", [])):
            obj_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
            self.db.execute(
                "INSERT INTO quest_objectives (id, quest_id, description, order_index, created_at) "
                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
                (obj_id, quest_id, obj, i, now)
            )

        # Add tags
        for tag in data.get("tags", []):
            self.db.execute(
                "INSERT INTO quest_tags (quest_id, tag) VALUES (?, ?)",
                (quest_id, tag)
            )

        self._log_activity(creator_id, "create", "quest", quest_id)
        self.db.notify_change("quest_created", {"quest_id": quest_id, "creator_id": creator_id})

        return self.get_quest(quest_id)

    def get_quest(self, quest_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        quest = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        if not quest:
            return None

        quest = dict(quest)
        quest["objectives"] = self.db.fetch_all(
            "SELECT * FROM quest_objectives WHERE quest_id = ? ORDER BY order_index",
            (quest_id,)
        )
        quest["tags"] = [
            row["tag"] for row in
            self.db.fetch_all("SELECT tag FROM quest_tags WHERE quest_id = ?", (quest_id,))
        ]
        quest["collaborators"] = self.db.fetch_all(
            "SELECT qc.*, u.username, u.display_name FROM quest_collaborators qc "
            "JOIN users u ON qc.user_id = u.id WHERE qc.quest_id = ?",
            (quest_id,)
        )
        return quest

    def list_quests(self, user_id: str, filters: Optional[Dict] = None) -> List[Dict]:
        query = """
            SELECT DISTINCT q.* FROM quests q
            LEFT JOIN quest_collaborators qc ON q.id = qc.quest_id
            WHERE (q.creator_id = ? OR q.assignee_id = ? OR qc.user_id = ?)
        """
        params = [user_id, user_id, user_id]

        if filters:
            if "status" in filters:
                query += " AND q.status = ?"
                params.append(filters["status"])
            if "quest_type" in filters:
                query += " AND q.quest_type = ?"
                params.append(filters["quest_type"])
            if "difficulty" in filters:
                query += " AND q.difficulty = ?"
                params.append(filters["difficulty"])

        query += " ORDER BY q.priority DESC, q.created_at DESC"
        quests = self.db.fetch_all(query, tuple(params))

        for quest in quests:
            quest["objectives"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM quest_objectives WHERE quest_id = ? ORDER BY order_index",
                (quest["id"],)
            )
            quest["tags"] = [
                row["tag"] for row in
                self.db.fetch_all("SELECT tag FROM quest_tags WHERE quest_id = ?", (quest["id"],))
            ]
        return quests

    def update_quest(self, quest_id: str, user_id: str, data: Dict) -> Dict:
        quest = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        if not quest:
            return {"error": "Quest not found"}

        if not self._has_permission(quest_id, user_id, "edit"):
            return {"error": "Permission denied"}

        allowed = {"title", "description", "quest_type", "status", "priority",
                   "difficulty", "xp_reward", "gold_reward", "assignee_id", "due_date"}
        filtered = {k: v for k, v in data.items() if k in allowed}

        if not filtered:
            return {"error": "No valid fields to update"}

        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        filtered["updated_at"] = now

        if filtered.get("status") == "completed":
            filtered["completed_at"] = now

        set_clause = ", ".join(f"{k} = ?" for k in filtered)
        values = list(filtered.values()) + [quest_id]
        self.db.execute(f"UPDATE quests SET {set_clause} WHERE id = ?", tuple(values))

        self._log_activity(user_id, "update", "quest", quest_id)
        self.db.notify_change("quest_updated", {
            "quest_id": quest_id, "user_id": user_id, "changes": filtered
        })

        return self.get_quest(quest_id)

    def complete_quest(self, quest_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        return self.update_quest(quest_id, user_id, {"status": "completed"})

    def complete_objective(self, quest_id: str, objective_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        if not self._has_permission(quest_id, user_id, "edit"):
            return {"error": "Permission denied"}

        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE quest_objectives SET is_completed = 1 WHERE id = ? AND quest_id = ?",
            (objective_id, quest_id)
        )

        # Check if all objectives completed
        remaining = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM quest_objectives "
            "WHERE quest_id = ? AND is_completed = 0",
            (quest_id,)
        )
        all_complete = remaining["count"] == 0

        self.db.notify_change("objective_completed", {
            "quest_id": quest_id, "objective_id": objective_id,
            "all_complete": all_complete
        })

        return {"success": True, "all_objectives_complete": all_complete}

    def add_collaborator(self, quest_id: str, user_id: str,
                         target_user_id: str, permission: str = "view") -> Dict:
        quest = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        if not quest:
            return {"error": "Quest not found"}
        if quest["creator_id"] != user_id:
            return {"error": "Only the quest creator can add collaborators"}

        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO quest_collaborators (quest_id, user_id, permission, added_at) "
            "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (quest_id, target_user_id, permission, now)
        )

        self.db.notify_change("collaborator_added", {
            "quest_id": quest_id, "user_id": target_user_id
        })
        return {"success": True}

    def delete_quest(self, quest_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        quest = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        if not quest:
            return {"error": "Quest not found"}
        if quest["creator_id"] != user_id:
            return {"error": "Only the quest creator can delete it"}

        self.db.execute("DELETE FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        self._log_activity(user_id, "delete", "quest", quest_id)
        return {"success": True}

    def get_quest_stats(self, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        stats = {}
        for status in ["active", "completed", "failed", "paused"]:
            result = self.db.fetch_one(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM quests WHERE creator_id = ? AND status = ?",
                (user_id, status)
            )
            stats[status] = result["count"]

        xp = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(xp_reward), 0) as total FROM quests "
            "WHERE creator_id = ? AND status = 'completed'",
            (user_id,)
        )
        stats["total_xp_earned"] = xp["total"]

        gold = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(gold_reward), 0) as total FROM quests "
            "WHERE creator_id = ? AND status = 'completed'",
            (user_id,)
        )
        stats["total_gold_earned"] = gold["total"]
        return stats

    def _has_permission(self, quest_id: str, user_id: str, required: str) -> bool:
        quest = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT creator_id FROM quests WHERE id = ?", (quest_id,))
        if not quest:
            return False
        if quest["creator_id"] == user_id:
            return True

        collab = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT permission FROM quest_collaborators WHERE quest_id = ? AND user_id = ?",
            (quest_id, user_id)
        )
        if not collab:
            return False

        permission_levels = {"view": 0, "edit": 1, "admin": 2}
        return permission_levels.get(collab["permission"], 0) >= permission_levels.get(required, 0)

    def _log_activity(self, user_id: str, action: str, entity_type: str, entity_id: str):
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO activity_log (id, user_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, created_at) "
            "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (str(uuid.uuid4()), user_id, action, entity_type, entity_id,
             datetime.utcnow().isoformat())
        )

# =============================================================================

class SkillService:
    """Manages skill trees, skill allocation, and skill plan sharing."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db

    def create_skill_tree(self, creator_id: str, data: Dict) -> Dict:
        tree_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()

        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO skill_trees (id, name, description, creator_id,
               class_type, max_points, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (tree_id, data.get("name", "Untitled Skill Tree"),
             data.get("description"), creator_id,
             data.get("class_type"), data.get("max_points", 100), now, now)
        )

        self.db.notify_change("skill_tree_created", {"tree_id": tree_id, "creator_id": creator_id})
        return self.get_skill_tree(tree_id)

    def get_skill_tree(self, tree_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        tree = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skill_trees WHERE id = ?", (tree_id,))
        if not tree:
            return None

        tree = dict(tree)
        tree["skills"] = self._get_tree_skills(tree_id)
        return tree

    def _get_tree_skills(self, tree_id: str) -> List[Dict]:
        skills = self.db.fetch_all(
            "SELECT * FROM skills WHERE skill_tree_id = ? ORDER BY tier, name",
            (tree_id,)
        )
        for skill in skills:
            skill["prerequisites"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT sp.*, s.name as prerequisite_name FROM skill_prerequisites sp "
                "JOIN skills s ON sp.prerequisite_id = s.id WHERE sp.skill_id = ?",
                (skill["id"],)
            )
        return skills

    def list_skill_trees(self, user_id: str) -> List[Dict]:
        trees = self.db.fetch_all(
            """SELECT DISTINCT st.* FROM skill_trees st
               LEFT JOIN skill_plan_shares sps ON st.id = sps.skill_tree_id
               WHERE st.creator_id = ? OR sps.user_id = ?
               ORDER BY st.updated_at DESC""",
            (user_id, user_id)
        )
        for tree in trees:
            tree["skill_count"] = self.db.fetch_one(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM skills WHERE skill_tree_id = ?",
                (tree["id"],)
            )["count"]
            points_used = self.db.fetch_one(
                "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(current_level * cost_per_level), 0) as total "
                "FROM skills WHERE skill_tree_id = ?",
                (tree["id"],)
            )
            tree["points_used"] = points_used["total"]
        return trees

    def add_skill(self, tree_id: str, user_id: str, data: Dict) -> Dict:
        tree = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skill_trees WHERE id = ?", (tree_id,))
        if not tree:
            return {"error": "Skill tree not found"}
        if not self._has_permission(tree_id, user_id, "edit"):
            return {"error": "Permission denied"}

        skill_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()

        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO skills (id, skill_tree_id, name, description, tier,
               max_level, current_level, cost_per_level, parent_skill_id,
               position_x, position_y, icon, created_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (skill_id, tree_id, data.get("name", "New Skill"),
             data.get("description"), data.get("tier", 1),
             data.get("max_level", 5), data.get("current_level", 0),
             data.get("cost_per_level", 1), data.get("parent_skill_id"),
             data.get("position_x", 0), data.get("position_y", 0),
             data.get("icon"), now)
        )

        # Add prerequisites
        for prereq in data.get("prerequisites", []):
            self.db.execute(
                "INSERT INTO skill_prerequisites (skill_id, prerequisite_id, required_level) "
                "VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
                (skill_id, prereq.get("skill_id"), prereq.get("required_level", 1))
            )

        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE skill_trees SET updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?", (now, tree_id)
        )
        self.db.notify_change("skill_added", {"tree_id": tree_id, "skill_id": skill_id})
        return self._get_skill(skill_id)

    def _get_skill(self, skill_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        skill = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skills WHERE id = ?", (skill_id,))
        if skill:
            skill = dict(skill)
            skill["prerequisites"] = self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM skill_prerequisites WHERE skill_id = ?", (skill_id,)
            )
        return skill

    def level_up_skill(self, skill_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        skill = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skills WHERE id = ?", (skill_id,))
        if not skill:
            return {"error": "Skill not found"}

        if not self._has_permission(skill["skill_tree_id"], user_id, "edit"):
            return {"error": "Permission denied"}

        if skill["current_level"] >= skill["max_level"]:
            return {"error": "Skill already at max level"}

        # Check prerequisites
        prereqs = self.db.fetch_all(
            "SELECT * FROM skill_prerequisites WHERE skill_id = ?", (skill_id,)
        )
        for prereq in prereqs:
            prereq_skill = self.db.fetch_one(
                "SELECT current_level FROM skills WHERE id = ?",
                (prereq["prerequisite_id"],)
            )
            if not prereq_skill or prereq_skill["current_level"] < prereq["required_level"]:
                return {"error": f"Prerequisite not met: requires level {prereq['required_level']}"}

        # Check points budget
        tree = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT * FROM skill_trees WHERE id = ?", (skill["skill_tree_id"],)
        )
        points_used = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(current_level * cost_per_level), 0) as total "
            "FROM skills WHERE skill_tree_id = ?",
            (skill["skill_tree_id"],)
        )
        if points_used["total"] + skill["cost_per_level"] > tree["max_points"]:
            return {"error": "Not enough skill points"}

        new_level = skill["current_level"] + 1
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE skills SET current_level = ? WHERE id = ?",
            (new_level, skill_id)
        )
        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE skill_trees SET updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?",
            (now, skill["skill_tree_id"])
        )

        self.db.notify_change("skill_leveled", {
            "skill_id": skill_id, "new_level": new_level,
            "tree_id": skill["skill_tree_id"]
        })
        return {"success": True, "new_level": new_level}

    def reset_skill_tree(self, tree_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        if not self._has_permission(tree_id, user_id, "edit"):
            return {"error": "Permission denied"}

        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE skills SET current_level = 0 WHERE skill_tree_id = ?", (tree_id,)
        )
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "UPDATE skill_trees SET updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?", (now, tree_id)
        )
        self.db.notify_change("skill_tree_reset", {"tree_id": tree_id})
        return {"success": True}

    def share_skill_tree(self, tree_id: str, user_id: str,
                         target_user_id: str, permission: str = "view") -> Dict:
        tree = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skill_trees WHERE id = ?", (tree_id,))
        if not tree:
            return {"error": "Skill tree not found"}
        if tree["creator_id"] != user_id:
            return {"error": "Only the creator can share"}

        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO skill_plan_shares (skill_tree_id, user_id, permission, shared_at) "
            "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (tree_id, target_user_id, permission, now)
        )
        return {"success": True}

    def delete_skill_tree(self, tree_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        tree = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT * FROM skill_trees WHERE id = ?", (tree_id,))
        if not tree:
            return {"error": "Skill tree not found"}
        if tree["creator_id"] != user_id:
            return {"error": "Only the creator can delete"}

        self.db.execute("DELETE FROM skill_trees WHERE id = ?", (tree_id,))
        return {"success": True}

    def _has_permission(self, tree_id: str, user_id: str, required: str) -> bool:
        tree = self.db.fetch_one("SELECT creator_id FROM skill_trees WHERE id = ?", (tree_id,))
        if not tree:
            return False
        if tree["creator_id"] == user_id:
            return True

        share = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT permission FROM skill_plan_shares WHERE skill_tree_id = ? AND user_id = ?",
            (tree_id, user_id)
        )
        if not share:
            return False

        levels = {"view": 0, "edit": 1, "admin": 2}
        return levels.get(share["permission"], 0) >= levels.get(required, 0)


# =============================================================================
# collaboration_service.py - Real-Time Collaboration Service
# =============================================================================

class CollaborationService:
    """Manages real-time collaboration rooms, messaging, and presence."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db
        self._active_connections: Dict[str, List[Dict]] = {}  # room_id -> connections
        self._user_presence: Dict[str, Dict] = {}  # user_id -> presence info

    def create_room(self, creator_id: str, data: Dict) -> Dict:
        room_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()

        self.db.execute(
            """INSERT INTO collaboration_rooms (id, name, room_type, reference_id,
               creator_id, max_participants, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)""",
            (room_id, data.get("name", "New Room"),
             data.get("room_type", "quest"),
             data.get("reference_id"), creator_id,
             data.get("max_participants", 10), now, now)
        )

        # Auto-join creator
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (room_id, creator_id, "admin", now)
        )

        self._active_connections[room_id] = []
        return self.get_room(room_id)

    def get_room(self, room_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        room = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT * FROM collaboration_rooms WHERE id = ?", (room_id,)
        )
        if not room:
            return None

        room = dict(room)
        room["participants"] = self.db.fetch_all(
            "SELECT rp.*, u.username, u.display_name FROM room_participants rp "
            "JOIN users u ON rp.user_id = u.id WHERE rp.room_id = ?",
            (room_id,)
        )
        return room

    def join_room(self, room_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        room = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT * FROM collaboration_rooms WHERE id = ?", (room_id,)
        )
        if not room:
            return {"error": "Room not found"}
        if not room["is_active"]:
            return {"error": "Room is closed"}

        participant_count = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ?",
            (room_id,)
        )
        if participant_count["count"] >= room["max_participants"]:
            return {"error": "Room is full"}

        existing = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT * FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ? AND user_id = ?",
            (room_id, user_id)
        )
        if existing:
            return {"success": True, "message": "Already in room"}

        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (room_id, user_id, "member", now)
        )

        self._broadcast_to_room(room_id, {
            "type": "user_joined",
            "user_id": user_id,
            "timestamp": now
        })
        return {"success": True}

    def leave_room(self, room_id: str, user_id: str) -> Dict:
        self.db.execute(
            "DELETE FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ? AND user_id = ?",
            (room_id, user_id)
        )
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        self._broadcast_to_room(room_id, {
            "type": "user_left",
            "user_id": user_id,
            "timestamp": now
        })
        return {"success": True}

    def send_message(self, room_id: str, user_id: str, content: str,
                     message_type: str = "text", metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> Dict:
        participant = self.db.fetch_one(
            "SELECT * FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ? AND user_id = ?",
            (room_id, user_id)
        )
        if not participant:
            return {"error": "Not a room participant"}

        msg_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        now = datetime.utcnow().isoformat()

        self.db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO room_messages (id, room_id, user_id, message_type, content, metadata, created_at) "
            "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (msg_id, room_id, user_id, message_type, content,
             json.dumps(metadata) if metadata else None, now)
        )

        message_data = {
            "type": "message",
            "id": msg_id,
            "user_id": user_id,
            "message_type": message_type,
            "content": content,
            "metadata": metadata,
            "timestamp": now
        }
        self._broadcast_to_room(room_id, message_data)
        return message_data

    def get_room_messages(self, room_id: str, limit: int = 50,
                          before: Optional[str] = None) -> List[Dict]:
        query = """
            SELECT rm.*, u.username, u.display_name
            FROM room_messages rm
            JOIN users u ON rm.user_id = u.id
            WHERE rm.room_id = ?
        """
        params = [room_id]
        if before:
            query += " AND rm.created_at < ?"
            params.append(before)
        query += " ORDER BY rm.created_at DESC LIMIT ?"
        params.append(limit)

        messages = self.db.fetch_all(query, tuple(params))
        messages.reverse()
        return messages

    def list_user_rooms(self, user_id: str) -> List[Dict]:
        rooms = self.db.fetch_all(
            """SELECT cr.*, rp.role as user_role FROM collaboration_rooms cr
               JOIN room_participants rp ON cr.id = rp.room_id
               WHERE rp.user_id = ? AND cr.is_active = 1
               ORDER BY cr.updated_at DESC""",
            (user_id,)
        )
        for room in rooms:
            participant_count = self.db.fetch_one(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ?",
                (room["id"],)
            )
            room["participant_count"] = participant_count["count"]
        return rooms

    def update_presence(self, user_id: str, status: str, activity: Optional[str] = None):
        self._user_presence[user_id] = {
            "status": status,
            "activity": activity,
            "last_seen": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        }

    def get_room_presence(self, room_id: str) -> List[Dict]:
        participants = self.db.fetch_all(
            "SELECT user_id FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = ?", (room_id,)
        )
        presence = []
        for p in participants:
            user_presence = self._user_presence.get(p["user_id"], {
                "status": "offline", "activity": None, "last_seen": None
            })
            presence.append({
                "user_id": p["user_id"],
                **user_presence
            })
        return presence

    def _broadcast_to_room(self, room_id: str, message: Dict):
        """Broadcast message to all connected clients in the room."""
        connections = self._active_connections.get(room_id, [])
        for conn in connections:
            try:
                conn["callback"](message)
            except Exception:
                pass

    def register_connection(self, room_id: str, user_id: str, callback: callable):
        if room_id not in self._active_connections:
            self._active_connections[room_id] = []
        self._active_connections[room_id].append({
            "user_id": user_id,
            "callback": callback
        })

    def unregister_connection(self, room_id: str, user_id: str):
        if room_id in self._active_connections:
            self._active_connections[room_id] = [
                c for c in self._active_connections[room_id]
                if c["user_id"] != user_id
            ]


# =============================================================================
# sync_service.py - Data Synchronization Service
# =============================================================================

class SyncService:
    """Handles real-time data synchronization across multiple devices and users."""

    def __init__(self, db: Database):
        self.db = db
        self._subscribers: Dict[str, List[callable]] = {}
        self._sync_state: Dict[str, str] = {}  # user_id -> last_sync timestamp
        db.add_listener(self._on_db_change)

    def subscribe(self, user_id: str, entity_type: str, callback: callable):
        key = f"{user_id}:{entity_type}"
        if key not in self._subscribers:
            self._subscribers[key] = []
        self._subscribers[key].append(callback)

    def unsubscribe(self, user_id: str, entity_type: str):
        key = f"{user_id}:{entity_type}"
        self._subscribers.pop(key, None)

    def get_changes_since(self, user_id: str, since: str) -> Dict:
        """Get all changes since a given timestamp for synchronization."""
        changes = {
            "quests": self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM quests WHERE (creator_id = ? OR assignee_id = ?) AND updated_at > ?",
                (user_id, user_id, since)
            ),
            "skill_trees": self.db.fetch_all(
                "SELECT * FROM skill_trees WHERE creator_id = ? AND updated_at > ?",
                (user_id, since)
            ),
            "messages": self.db.fetch_all(
                """SELECT rm.* FROM room_messages rm
                   JOIN room_participants rp ON rm.room_id = rp.room_id
                   WHERE rp.user_id = ? AND rm.created_at > ?""",
                (user_id, since)
            ),
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        }
        self._sync_state[user_id] = changes["timestamp"]
        return changes

    def _on_db_change(self, event_type: str, data: Dict):
        """Handle database change events and notify subscribers."""
        entity_type = event_type.split("_")[0]
        for key, callbacks in self._subscribers.items():
            user_id, sub_type = key.split(":", 1)
            if sub_type == entity_type or sub_type == "*":
                for callback in callbacks:
                    try:
                        callback(event_type, data)
                    except Exception:
                        pass


# =============================================================================
# websocket_server.py - WebSocket Server for Real-Time Communication
# =============================================================================

class WebSocketFrame:
    """Minimal WebSocket frame encoder/decoder."""

    @staticmethod
    def encode(data: str) -> bytes:
        payload = data.encode('utf-8')
        frame = bytearray()
        frame.append(0x81)  # FIN + text opcode

        length = len(payload)
        if length < 126:
            frame.append(length)
        elif length < 65536:
            frame.append(126)
            frame.extend(struct.pack('>H', length))
        else:
            frame.append(127)
            frame.extend(struct.pack('>Q', length))

        frame.extend(payload)
        return bytes(frame)

    @staticmethod
    def decode(data: bytes) -> Optional[str]:
        if len(data) < 2:
            return None

        length = data[1] & 0x7F
        mask_start = 2

        if length == 126:
            length = struct.unpack('>H', data[2:4])[0]
            mask_start = 4
        elif length == 127:
            length = struct.unpack('>Q', data[2:10])[0]
            mask_start = 10

        if data[1] & 0x80:  # Masked
            mask = data[mask_start:mask_start + 4]
            payload_start = mask_start + 4
            payload = bytearray(data[payload_start:payload_start + length])
            for i in range(len(payload)):
                payload[i] ^= mask[i % 4]
            return payload.decode('utf-8')
        else:
            payload_start = mask_start
            return data[payload_start:payload_start + length].decode('utf-8')


class RealtimeHub:
    """Central hub for real-time event distribution."""

    def __init__(self):
        self._channels: Dict[str, List[callable]] = {}
        self._user_channels: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}

    def subscribe(self, channel: str, user_id: str, callback: callable):
        if channel not in self._channels:
            self._channels[channel] = []
        self._channels[channel].append({"user_id": user_id, "callback": callback})

        if user_id not in self._user_channels:
            self._user_channels[user_id] = []
        self._user_channels[user_id].append(channel)

    def unsubscribe(self, user_id: str):
        channels = self._user_channels.pop(user_id, [])
        for channel in channels:
            if channel in self._channels:
                self._channels[channel] = [
                    s for s in self._channels[channel] if s["user_id"] != user_id
                ]

    def publish(self, channel: str, event: Dict, exclude_user: Optional[str] = None):
        subscribers = self._channels.get(channel, [])
        for sub in subscribers:
            if exclude_user and sub["user_id"] == exclude_user:
                continue
            try:
                sub["callback"](event)
            except Exception:
                pass

    def broadcast(self, event: Dict, exclude_user: Optional[str] = None):
        for channel, subscribers in self._channels.items():
            for sub in subscribers:
                if exclude_user and sub["user_id"] == exclude_user:
                    continue
                try:
                    sub["callback"](event)
                except Exception:
                    pass


# =============================================================================
# api.py - REST API Layer
# =============================================================================

class APIRouter:
    """Routes HTTP requests to appropriate service handlers."""

    def __init__(self, auth: AuthService, quests: QuestService,
                 skills: SkillService, collab: CollaborationService,
                 sync: SyncService, hub: RealtimeHub):
        self.auth = auth
        self.quests = quests
        self.skills = skills
        self.collab = collab
        self.sync = sync
        self.hub = hub

    def authenticate(self, headers: Dict) -> Optional[Dict]:
        auth_header = headers.get("Authorization", "")
        if auth_header.startswith("Bearer "):
            token = auth_header[7:]
            return self.auth.validate_token(token)
        return None

    def handle_request(self, method: str, path: str, body: Optional[Dict],
                       headers: Dict, query: Dict) -> Tuple[int, Dict]:
        # Public endpoints
        if path == "/api/auth/register" and method == "POST":
            return self._handle_register(body)
        if path == "/api/auth/login" and method == "POST":
            return self._handle_login(body)

        # Authenticated endpoints
        user = self.authenticate(headers)
        if not user:
            return 401, {"error": "Authentication required"}

        user_id = user["user_id"]

        # Auth routes
        if path == "/api/auth/logout" and method == "POST":
            token = headers.get("Authorization", "")[7:]
            self.auth.logout(token)
            return 200, {"success": True}
        if path == "/api/auth/profile" and method == "GET":
            return 200, self.auth.get_user_profile(user_id)
        if path == "/api/auth/profile" and method == "PUT":
            return 200, self.auth.update_profile(user_id, body)

        # Quest routes
        if path == "/api/quests" and method == "GET":
            filters = {k: v[0] if isinstance(v, list) else v for k, v in query.items()}
            return 200, {"quests": self.quests.list_quests(user_id, filters)}
        if path == "/api/quests" and method == "POST":
            result = self.quests.create_quest(user_id, body)
            return 201 if "id" in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/quests/") and method == "GET":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[3]
            quest = self.quests.get_quest(quest_id)
            return (200, quest) if quest else (404, {"error": "Not found"})
        if path.startswith("/api/quests/") and method == "PUT":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.quests.update_quest(quest_id, user_id, body)
            return 200 if "error" not in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/quests/") and method == "DELETE":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.quests.delete_quest(quest_id, user_id)
            return 200 if "success" in result else 400, result
        if path.endswith("/complete") and method == "POST":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.quests.complete_quest(quest_id, user_id)
            return 200 if "error" not in result else 400, result
        if "/objectives/" in path and path.endswith("/complete") and method == "POST":
            parts = path.split("/")
            quest_id = parts[3]
            obj_id = parts[5]
            result = self.quests.complete_objective(quest_id, obj_id, user_id)
            return 200 if "success" in result else 400, result
        if path.endswith("/collaborators") and method == "POST":
            quest_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.quests.add_collaborator(
                quest_id, user_id, body.get("user_id"), body.get("permission", "view")
            )
            return 200 if "success" in result else 400, result
        if path == "/api/quests/stats" and method == "GET":
            return 200, self.quests.get_quest_stats(user_id)

        # Skill tree routes
        if path == "/api/skills/trees" and method == "GET":
            return 200, {"skill_trees": self.skills.list_skill_trees(user_id)}
        if path == "/api/skills/trees" and method == "POST":
            result = self.skills.create_skill_tree(user_id, body)
            return 201 if result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/trees/") and method == "GET":
            tree_id = path.split("/")[4]
            tree = self.skills.get_skill_tree(tree_id)
            return (200, tree) if tree else (404, {"error": "Not found"})
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/trees/") and path.endswith("/skills") and method == "POST":
            tree_id = path.split("/")[4]
            result = self.skills.add_skill(tree_id, user_id, body)
            return 201 if result and "error" not in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/trees/") and path.endswith("/reset") and method == "POST":
            tree_id = path.split("/")[4]
            result = self.skills.reset_skill_tree(tree_id, user_id)
            return 200 if "success" in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/trees/") and path.endswith("/share") and method == "POST":
            tree_id = path.split("/")[4]
            result = self.skills.share_skill_tree(
                tree_id, user_id, body.get("user_id"), body.get("permission", "view")
            )
            return 200 if "success" in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/trees/") and method == "DELETE":
            tree_id = path.split("/")[4]
            result = self.skills.delete_skill_tree(tree_id, user_id)
            return 200 if "success" in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/skills/") and path.endswith("/levelup") and method == "POST":
            skill_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.skills.level_up_skill(skill_id, user_id)
            return 200 if "success" in result else 400, result

        # Collaboration routes
        if path == "/api/rooms" and method == "GET":
            return 200, {"rooms": self.collab.list_user_rooms(user_id)}
        if path == "/api/rooms" and method == "POST":
            result = self.collab.create_room(user_id, body)
            return 201 if result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/join") and method == "POST":
            room_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.collab.join_room(room_id, user_id)
            return 200 if "error" not in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/leave") and method == "POST":
            room_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.collab.leave_room(room_id, user_id)
            return 200, result
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/messages") and method == "GET":
            room_id = path.split("/")[3]
            limit = int(query.get("limit", [50])[0] if isinstance(query.get("limit"), list) else query.get("limit", 50))
            return 200, {"messages": self.collab.get_room_messages(room_id, limit)}
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/messages") and method == "POST":
            room_id = path.split("/")[3]
            result = self.collab.send_message(
                room_id, user_id, body.get("content", ""),
                body.get("message_type", "text"), body.get("metadata")
            )
            return 200 if "error" not in result else 400, result
        if path.startswith("/api/rooms/") and path.endswith("/presence") and method == "GET":
            room_id = path.split("/")[3]
            return 200, {"presence": self.collab.get_room_presence(room_id)}

        # Sync routes
        if path == "/api/sync" and method == "GET":
            since = query.get("since", [datetime.utcnow().isoformat()])[0] if isinstance(
                query.get("since"), list) else query.get("since", datetime.utcnow().isoformat())
            return 200, self.sync.get_changes_since(user_id, since)

        return 404, {"error": "Endpoint not found"}

    def _handle_register(self, body: Dict) -> Tuple[int, Dict]:
        if not body:
            return 400, {"error": "Request body required"}
        required = ["username", "email", "password"]
        for field in required:
            if field not in body:
                return 400, {"error": f"Missing field: {field}"}
        result = self.auth.register(
            body["username"], body["email"], body["password"],
            body.get("display_name")
        )
        return (201, result) if "error" not in result else (400, result)

    def _handle_login(self, body: Dict) -> Tuple[int, Dict]:
        if not body:
            return 400, {"error": "Request body required"}
        if "username" not in body or "password" not in body:
            return 400, {"error": "Username and password required"}
        result = self.auth.login(body["username"], body["password"])
        return (200, result) if "error" not in result else (401, result)

    <script>
    const API = '';
    let token = localStorage.getItem('questhub_token');
    let currentUser = null;
    let wsConnection = null;

    async function api(method, path, body = null) {
        const opts = { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } };
        if (token) opts.headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + token;
        if (body) opts.body = JSON.stringify(body);
        const res = await fetch(API + path, opts);
        return { status: res.status, data: await res.json() };
    }

    function showTab(tab) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
        event.target.classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById('login-form').classList.toggle('hidden', tab !== 'login');
        document.getElementById('register-form').classList.toggle('hidden', tab !== 'register');
    }

    async function login() {
        const username = document.getElementById('login-username').value;
        const password = document.getElementById('login-password').value;
        const { status, data } = await api('POST', '/api/auth/login', { username, password });
        if (status === 200) { token = data.token; localStorage.setItem('questhub_token', token); currentUser = data; showApp(); }
        else document.getElementById('auth-error').textContent = data.error;
    }

    async function register() {
        const body = {
            username: document.getElementById('reg-username').value,
            email: document.getElementById('reg-email').value,
            display_name: document.getElementById('reg-display').value,
            password: document.getElementById('reg-password').value
        };
        const { status, data } = await api('POST', '/api/auth/register', body);
        if (status === 201) { token = data.token; localStorage.setItem('questhub_token', token); currentUser = data; showApp(); }
        else document.getElementById('auth-error').textContent = data.error;
    }

    function logout() {
        api('POST', '/api/auth/logout');
        token = null; localStorage.removeItem('questhub_token');
        document.getElementById('main-app').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('auth-screen').classList.remove('hidden');
    }

    async function showApp() {
        document.getElementById('auth-screen').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('main-app').classList.remove('hidden');
        navigate('dashboard');
    }

    async function navigate(page) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
        document.querySelector(`[data-nav="${page}"]`)?.classList.add('active');
        const content = document.getElementById('page-content');
        const title = document.getElementById('page-title');
        const actions = document.getElementById('header-actions');

        switch(page) {
            case 'dashboard': title.textContent = 'Dashboard'; actions.innerHTML = ''; await renderDashboard(content); break;
            case 'quests': title.textContent = 'Quests'; actions.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showCreateQuest()">+ New Quest</button>'; await renderQuests(content); break;
            case 'skills': title.textContent = 'Skill Planner'; actions.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showCreateSkillTree()">+ New Skill Tree</button>'; await renderSkills(content); break;
            case 'collab': title.textContent = 'Collaboration'; actions.innerHTML = '<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showCreateRoom()">+ New Room</button>'; await renderCollab(content); break;
            case 'profile': title.textContent = 'Profile'; actions.innerHTML = ''; await renderProfile(content); break;
        }
    }

    async function renderDashboard(el) {
        const { data: stats } = await api('GET', '/api/quests/stats');
        const { data: questData } = await api('GET', '/api/quests?status=active');
        const quests = questData?.quests || [];
        el.innerHTML = `
            <div class="stats-grid fade-in">
                <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-value">${stats?.active||0}</div><div class="stat-label">Active Quests</div></div>
                <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-value">${stats?.completed||0}</div><div class="stat-label">Completed</div></div>
                <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-value" style="color:var(--xp)">${stats?.total_xp_earned||0}</div><div class="stat-label">Total XP</div></div>
                <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-value" style="color:var(--gold)">${stats?.total_gold_earned||0}</div><div class="stat-label">Total Gold</div></div>
            </div>
            <h3 style="margin-bottom:1rem">Active Quests</h3>
            <div class="grid fade-in">
                ${quests.slice(0,6).map(q => questCard(q)).join('')}
                ${quests.length === 0 ? '<p style="color:var(--text-muted)">No active quests. Create one to get started!</p>' : ''}
            </div>`;
    }

    function questCard(q) {
        return `<div class="card quest-card">
            <span class="status-badge status-${q.status}">${q.status}</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">${q.title}</h3>
            <p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.85rem;margin:0.5rem 0">${q.description||''}</p>
            <span class="difficulty diff-${q.difficulty}">${q.difficulty}</span>
            <div class="rewards">
                <span class="reward reward-xp">✨ ${q.xp_reward} XP</span>
                <span class="reward reward-gold">🪙 ${q.gold_reward} Gold</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tags">${(q.tags||[]).map(t=>`<span class="tag">${t}</span>`).join('')}</div>
            <div style="margin-top:1rem;display:flex;gap:0.5rem">
                ${q.status==='active'?`<button class="btn btn-success" onclick="completeQuest('${q.id}')">Complete</button>`:''}
                <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="viewQuest('${q.id}')">View</button>
            </div>
        </div>`;
    }

    async function renderQuests(el) {
        const { data } = await api('GET', '/api/quests');
        const quests = data?.quests || [];
        el.innerHTML = `<div class="grid fade-in">${quests.map(q => questCard(q)).join('')}</div>`;
    }

    async function renderSkills(el) {
        const { data } = await api('GET', '/api/skills/trees');
        const trees = data?.skill_trees || [];
        el.innerHTML = `<div class="grid fade-in">${trees.map(t => `
            <div class="card">
                <h3 class="card-title">${t.name}</h3>
                <p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.85rem">${t.description||'No description'}</p>
                <p style="margin-top:0.5rem;font-size:0.85rem">Class: <strong>${t.class_type||'General'}</strong></p>
                <p style="font-size:0.85rem">Skills: ${t.skill_count||0} | Points: ${t.points_used||0}/${t.max_points}</p>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" style="margin-top:1rem" onclick="viewSkillTree('${t.id}')">View Tree</button>
            </div>`).join('')}
            ${trees.length===0?'<p style="color:var(--text-muted)">No skill trees yet.</p>':''}
        </div>`;
    }

    async function renderCollab(el) {
        const { data } = await api('GET', '/api/rooms');
        const rooms = data?.rooms || [];
        el.innerHTML = `<div class="grid fade-in">${rooms.map(r => `
            <div class="card">
                <h3 class="card-title">${r.name}</h3>
                <p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.85rem">Type: ${r.room_type} | Participants: ${r.participant_count||0}/${r.max_participants}</p>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" style="margin-top:1rem" onclick="openRoom('${r.id}')">Enter Room</button>
            </div>`).join('')}
            ${rooms.length===0?'<p style="color:var(--text-muted)">No active rooms.</p>':''}

class QuestHubHandler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    """HTTP request handler for QuestHub API and frontend."""

    router: APIRouter = None

    def log_message(self, format, *args):
        pass  # Suppress default logging

    def _send_response(self, status: int, data: Any):
        self.send_response(status)
        self.send_header('Content-Type', 'application/json')
        self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*')
        self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS')
        self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type, Authorization')
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(json.dumps(data, default=str).encode())

    def _send_html(self, html: str):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html; charset=utf-8')
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(html.encode())

    def _get_body(self) -> Optional[Dict]:
        content_length = int(self.headers.get('Content-Length', 0))
        if content_length > 0:
            body = self.rfile.read(content_length)
            try:
                return json.loads(body)
            except json.JSONDecodeError:
                return None
        return None

    def _get_headers(self) -> Dict:
        return {key: self.headers[key] for key in self.headers}

    def do_OPTIONS(self):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*')
        self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS')
        self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type, Authorization')
        self.end_headers()

    def do_GET(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        if parsed.path == '/' or parsed.path == '/index.html':
            self._send_html(FRONTEND_HTML)
            return
        if parsed.path.startswith('/api/'):
            query = parse_qs(parsed.query)
            status, data = self.router.handle_request(
                'GET', parsed.path, None, self._get_headers(), query
            )
            self._send_response(status, data)
        else:
            self._send_response(404, {"error": "Not found"})

    def do_POST(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        body = self._get_body()
        query = parse_qs(parsed.query)
        status, data = self.router.handle_request(
            'POST', parsed.path, body, self._get_headers(), query
        )
        self._send_response(status, data)

    def do_PUT(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        body = self._get_body()
        query = parse_qs(parsed.query)
        status, data = self.router.handle_request(
            'PUT', parsed.path, body, self._get_headers(), query
        )
        self._send_response(status, data)

    def do_DELETE(self):
        parsed = urlparse(self.path)
        query = parse_qs(parsed.query)
        status, data = self.router.handle_request(
            'DELETE', parsed.path, None, self._get_headers(), query
        )
        self._send_response(status, data)

class QuestHubApp:
    """Main application class that wires all components together."""

    def __init__(self, db_path: str = ":memory:", host: str = "0.0.0.0", port: int = 8080):
        self.host = host
        self.port = port

        # Initialize database
        self.db = Database(db_path)

        # Initialize services
        self.auth_service = AuthService(self.db)
        self.quest_service = QuestService(self.db)
        self.skill_service = SkillService(self.db)
        self.collab_service = CollaborationService(self.db)
        self.sync_service = SyncService(self.db)
        self.realtime_hub = RealtimeHub()

        # Initialize API router
        self.router = APIRouter(
            self.auth_service,
            self.quest_service,
            self.skill_service,
            self.collab_service,
            self.sync_service,
            self.realtime_hub
        )

        # Wire up real-time notifications
        self.db.add_listener(self._on_change)

    def _on_change(self, event_type: str, data: Dict):
        """Broadcast database changes through the real-time hub."""
        self.realtime_hub.broadcast({
            "type": "data_change",
            "event": event_type,
            "data": data,
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        })

    def run(self):
        """Start the HTTP server."""
        QuestHubHandler.router = self.router
        server = HTTPServer((self.host, self.port), QuestHubHandler)
        print(f"🎮 QuestHub server running at http://{self.host}:{self.port}")
        print(f"📊 Dashboard: http://localhost:{self.port}/")
        print(f"🔌 API Base:  http://localhost:{self.port}/api/")
        print("Press Ctrl+C to stop")
        try:
            server.serve_forever()
        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            server.shutdown()
            print("\n✨ QuestHub server stopped")

def main():
    """Entry point for QuestHub application."""
    import sys

    port = int(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 8080
    seed = "--seed" in sys.argv or "--demo" in sys.argv

    app = QuestHubApp(db_path=":memory:", port=port)

    if seed:
        app.seed_demo_data()

    app.run()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
